text: all additional parameters like '-i' should be passed to grep. grep should operate on whole files, so even meta-data could be grepped for.

grepping would be improved if labels were listed in one line in the json file. currently they're listed in separate lines, with the 'label' keyword on a line by itself. that prevents expressions like 'labels.*feature'. (nice to have, but not critical, since labels can be searched for in other ways, too.)
